{{Infobox group
| name = Court of Seven (Cradle)
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Court of Seven (Cradle) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Court]] of Seven is the governing body of the [[Abidan]], a group of powerful beings responsible for maintaining order across many worlds. Composed of [[Judges]], the [[Court]] operates from a central location and utilizes specialized members to carry out its will. While the group traditionally consists of seven individuals, some accounts suggest an eighth member may exist within their structure. The [[Judges]] often work independently in specialized areas, though certain members, such as the [[Phoenix]], serve to facilitate cooperation between them. The [[Court]] has a deep historical connection to the world of [[Cradle]], which served as the birthplace for the original members of the [[Court]] before they ascended. The organization manages various programs, including the appointment of [[Executors]] and the establishment of the [[Reaper Division]]—a group tasked with eliminating threats to existence. These agents report to Ozriel, who in turn reports to the [[Court]]. The [[Judges]] possess immense power, with some being capable of matching one another in combat or acting as essential tools to push back chaos. Despite their strength, the [[Court]] has faced internal challenges, including members who have abandoned their duties or been accused of betrayal.}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Court]] of Seven is a group that Ozriel might be capable of hiding from.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Court]] of Seven issued a united ruling to salvage lives from the outer sectors.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The second [[Court]] of Seven chose [[Daruman]] to be one of the first [[Executors]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Court]] of Seven has the authority to sentence [[Daruman]] to die.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Court]] of Seven is a group composed of [[Judges]] including the [[Hound]] and the [[Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Before their ascension from [[Cradle]], the original first-generation [[Court]] of Seven constructed an ancient [[labyrinth]]. This authoritative group misplaced Ozriel and eventually took [[Ozmanthus]] into custody. To expand their holdings, they utilized Ozriel as a machete to beat back the wilderness of chaos. After centuries of absence, the members manifested together for the first time, though they ultimately denied Ozriel's request to recruit. Despite their power, the group faces the possibility of being disbanded by [[Makiel]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The original [[Court]] of Seven built an ancient [[labyrinth]] before their ascension.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Court]] of Seven is a group that misplaced Ozriel.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Court]] of Seven took [[Ozmanthus]] into custody.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Court]] of Seven used Ozriel as a machete to beat back the wilderness of chaos and expand their holdings.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The first-generation [[Court]] of Seven ascended from [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Court]] of Seven manifested together for the first time in centuries.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Court]] of Seven denied Ozriel's request to recruit.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Court]] of Seven is a group that [[Makiel]] might disband.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Court]] of Seven is a group with authority.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Makiel]] will hold himself accountable to the [[Court]] of Seven.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Court]] of Seven is a group that can retaliate.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Court]] of Seven is a group that [[Makiel]] wants to rebuild.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Court]] of Seven has an old wound that [[Suriel]] seeks to patch over.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Court]] of Seven consists of members like the [[Fox]], the [[Phoenix]], and [[the Ghost]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Court]] of Seven is a governing body that the [[Judges]] report to.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Court]] of Seven closely scrutinizes the actions taken by Ozriel, though they have chosen not to execute him. Within their ranks, [[Gadrael]] serves as the second member of this group. The [[Court]] has restricted the abilities of [[Eithan]], whom they later stared at directly. While the [[Abidan]] struck a blow on their behalf, the [[Reaper Division]] continues to seek legitimacy in their eyes. Throughout these events, [[Suriel]] has attempted to heal the [[Court]], and the Silverlord has inquired whether she possesses their word.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Court]] of Seven scrutinizes the actions of Ozriel.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Court]] of Seven has restricted [[Eithan]]'s abilities.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Gadrael]] is the second member of the [[Court]] of Seven.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Court]] of Seven has not executed Ozriel.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Reaper Division]] seeks legitimacy in the eyes of the [[Court]] of Seven.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Abidan]] struck a blow on behalf of the [[Court]] of Seven.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Silverlord asks if she has the word of the [[Court]] of Seven.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Suriel]] has attempted to heal the [[Court]] of Seven.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Court]] of Seven stared at [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
